nasb.text: When the sixth hour came, darkness fell over the whole land until the ninth hour.

esv.text: And when the sixth hour had come, there was darkness over the whole land until the ninth hour.

cnv.text: 從正午到下午三點鐘，遍地都黑暗了。

ccb.text: 正午时分，黑暗笼罩着整个大地，一直到下午三点。

csbs.text: 到了中午十二点，黑暗笼罩了整个大地，一直到下午三点。
